meta.author: yuki (assistant)
meta.notes: Full 100-item config (developer-ready). All recipes use vanilla crafting table or furnace; Divine Forge reserved for fusion.

items.name: Divine Excavator
items.description: The ultimate netherite pickaxe, forged by the gods. Auto-smelt, area modes, huge speed.
items.usage: Mining tool with area modes, fortune V, auto-smelt.
items.acquisition: Primary: Oracle Chest Divine (legendary pool). Optional: admin auction. (Not draftable by default.)

effects.positive: Mining speed x8, auto-smelt 100%, auto-pickup radius 5, fortune V
effects.negative: Banned in spawn/arena; heavy balancing risk; high repair cost

items.name: GodWings
items.description: Relic of Ascension: grants unlimited creative-like flight when equipped in chest slot.
items.usage: Grants unlimited flight, no energy. Restricted in PVP arenas via config.
items.acquisition: Oracle Chest Divine (legendary) or admin auction.

effects.negative: Enforce region restrictions to avoid abuse

items.name: Mjölnir of the Ascended
items.description: A godly hammer which can be thrown and recalled; calls lightning on hit.
items.usage: Throwable with recall; lightning AOE on strike.
items.acquisition: Oracle Chest Divine (very rare) or admin sale.

effects.negative: Wield restriction; grief potential; banned zones

items.name: Vanguard Blade
items.description: Reliable upgraded sword for midgame combat.
items.usage: Slightly higher damage and lifesteal.
items.acquisition: Divine Forge from netherite sword + MYTHIC_POWER_CORE or craft via upgrade patterns.
items.notes: Obtain via Divine Forge or advanced crafting.

items.name: Divinebreaker
items.description: A legendary sword capable of breaking through defenses.
items.usage: High damage in PVE with special on-hit effects.

effects.negative: May be banned in some PVP zones

items.name: Reinforced Helmet
items.usage: Adds tiered damage reduction.
items.acquisition: Divine Forge or simple crafting with Divine Alloy Ingot components.

items.name: Reinforced Chestplate
items.description: Chestplate that grants extra HP and defense.
items.usage: +2 HP and percent defense boost.
items.acquisition: Divine Forge or crafting with Divine Alloy

items.name: Reinforced Leggings
items.usage: +10% damage reduction.

items.name: Reinforced Boots
items.usage: -10% fall damage.

items.name: Elite Combat Helmet
items.description: Tactical helmet with integrated life support. Part of the Elite Combat set.
items.usage: +2 HP, +10% Damage Reduction.

items.name: Elite Combat Chestplate
items.description: Heavy-duty chestplate designed for extreme conditions. Part of the Elite Combat set.
items.usage: +4 HP, +15% Damage Reduction.

items.name: Elite Combat Leggings
items.description: Reinforced leg armor for tactical mobility. Part of the Elite Combat set.
items.usage: +2 HP, +10% Damage Reduction.

items.name: Elite Combat Boots
items.description: Shock-absorbing boots. Part of the Elite Combat set.
items.usage: +2 HP, +5% DR, No Fall Damage.

items.name: Precision Hoe
items.description: Improves farming speed and auto-replants basic seeds.
items.usage: Faster tilling and occasional auto-replant.
items.acquisition: Craftable in table from iron + ETHEREAL_SHARD + wood

items.name: Hyper Farmer Hoe
items.usage: Mass harvesting of crops with auto replant.
items.acquisition: Divine Forge or crafting with MYTHIC_POWER_CORE + PRECISION_HOE

items.name: Enhanced Miner's Pickaxe
items.description: First-tier upgraded pickaxe with increased speed.
items.usage: Mining speed +20% and slight durability increase.
items.acquisition: Divine Forge upgrade from diamond/netherite pick + MYTHIC_POWER_CORE or as mid-tier craft.

items.name: Super Miner's Pickaxe
items.description: Second-tier pickaxe: fast, auto-pickup and bonus drops.
items.usage: Mining speed +80%, auto-pickup radius 3, +chance Enhancement Shard
items.acquisition: Divine Forge or high-tier crafting via DIVINE_POWER_CORE

items.name: Refined Axe
items.usage: Tree-fell mechanics at higher tiers with upgrades.

items.name: Super Lumberjack Axe
items.description: Tears down full trees in one swing.
items.usage: Fells whole tree at once (careful with protections).

effects.negative: Can be abused; region locks recommended

items.name: Excavator Shovel
items.usage: Area dig 3x3 per swing.

items.name: Earthmover Shovel
items.usage: Giant area dig for terrain projects.

items.name: Gacha Crate (Basic)
items.description: Right-click to spin! Chance for resources.
items.usage: Consumable. Pity system included.

items.name: Gacha Crate (Premium)
items.description: Right-click to spin! High chance for Legendaries.
items.usage: Consumable. Pity system included.

items.name: Ultra Miner Pickaxe
items.usage: Mining. Right-click to toggle 3x3/Tummel.

items.name: Purified Water
items.usage: Drink to restore 30 Thirst.

items.name: Juicer Machine
items.usage: Place down. Input Fruit + Purified Water.

items.name: Prime Drill
items.description: Mechanical drill prototype for fast tunneling.
items.usage: High-speed tunneling with configurable modes.

items.name: Fortune Sword: Nemesis
items.description: Legendary sword that increases mob drop quantities.
items.usage: On kill, chance to yield extra drops; Sharpness L4 base.

items.name: Rapid Dagger
items.description: Fast attacking dagger with minor crit boost.
items.usage: High attack speed, low damage, +crit chance.

items.name: Heavy Greatsword
items.description: Slow, heavy weapon with high cleave damage.
items.usage: Boss fights and crowd control.

items.name: Blessed Water
items.description: Purified drinking water produced by smelting Water Bottle in furnace.
items.usage: Restores thirst +30 when consumed.
items.acquisition: Smelt water bottle in vanilla furnace -> Blessed Water (200 ticks).

items.name: Helmet of the Lost Knight
items.description: Ghostly helmet with faint glowing eyes. Part of the Lost Knight set.
items.usage: +4 HP, +15% DR, Night Vision.

items.name: Chestplate of the Lost Knight
items.description: Ghostly chestplate providing immense defense. Part of the Lost Knight set.
items.usage: +8 HP, +25% DR, Invisibility while sneaking.

items.name: Leggings of the Lost Knight
items.description: Semi-transparent leg armor. Part of the Lost Knight set.

items.name: Boots of the Lost Knight
items.description: Weightless boots that glide above the ground. Part of the Lost Knight set.
items.usage: +4 HP, +10% DR, Speed II.

items.name: Skyshaper Lance
items.description: Ranged weapon that shoots explosive wind charges.
items.usage: Right click to shoot Wind Charge.

items.name: Sieve
items.usage: Insert mesh and right click with dirt/gravel/sand.

items.name: String Mesh
items.usage: Inside Sieve.

items.name: Flint Mesh
items.usage: Inside Sieve.

items.name: Iron Mesh
items.usage: Inside Sieve.

items.name: Diamond Mesh
items.usage: Inside Sieve.

items.name: Netherite Mesh
items.usage: Inside Sieve.

items.name: §6Cobblestone Minion
items.description: Auto-mines a 5x5 platform below it. Generates stone and ores automatically.
items.usage: Place on ground. Right-click to collect. Connect chest for auto-output.

items.name: <green>Wooden Crook</green>
items.description: Use on leaves to getting silkworms.
items.usage: Break leaves.

items.name: <gold>Oracle Chest (Basic)</gold>
items.description: A standard crate for the Gacha system.
items.usage: Right-click to open.

items.name: <light_purple>Oracle Chest (Divine)</light_purple>
items.description: A divine crate for the Gacha system.
items.usage: Right-click to open.

items.name: <aqua>Oracle Chest (Premium)</aqua>
items.description: A premium crate for the Gacha system.
items.usage: Right-click to open.

divine_forge_config.fusion_rules_description: If both items have same enchant type & level L => result level L+1. Multi-enchant merge merges matching enchants.
divine_forge_config.notes: Atomic transactions required; show preview with final NBT and BTC cost before confirming.

developer_notes.crafting_btc_hook: Intercept InventoryClickEvent/CraftItemEvent and perform atomic BTC deduction before giving result.
developer_notes.divine_excavator_hook: On BlockBreakEvent, detect item NBT divine:true then apply custom break speed, auto-smelt, and auto-pickup. Implement area mining with careful throttling.
developer_notes.oracle_crate: On right-click crate, consume one and open server-side GUI. Use persistent player.gachaCount for pity logic.
developer_notes.shop_atomic: Lock chest region while purchase to prevent race conditions. Use server transactions.
developer_notes.thirst: Use BossBar API per-player; schedule periodic drains based on activity and persist on logout.
developer_notes.performance: Throttle batch operations and limit features per world or region to prevent abuse.
